out_of_scope_note: Tissue-clearing protocol and atlas-release paper (BIO-PROTOCOL): adapts iDISCO/uDISCO clearing to rat brains and publishes a 25 um common coordinate atlas with code/data. Pure neuroimaging/preprocessing infrastructure — no perceptual, decision-making, encoding, or computational/theoretical brain-function claim. Per synopsis_prompt rule on neuroimaging/preprocessing tools and pipelines (e.g. fMRIPrep release papers), marked out-of-scope for the lab's theoretical interview queue.
